name: confidenceQuery
invariants: output.ok === false || output.result.matches.every(function(m){ return Number.isFinite(m.confidence) && m.confidence >= 0 && m.confidence <= 1; })
_note: LENS_ACTIONS handler (registerLensAction). Dispatch key 'commonsense.confidenceQuery'. KnowledgeBaseWorkbench.tsx sends {subject,minConfidence,relation,useConceptNet} (flat params) and reads {subject,minConfidence,matches:[{subject,relation,relationLabel,object,confidence,source,origin}],count,localCount,conceptNetCount,interpretation} — verified aligned. Confidence-weighted query over the per-user fact store + optional ConceptNet edges (weight→saturating confidence 1-exp(-w/3)). minConfidence clamped [0,1] so poisoned '1e999'/-1 collapse; every match confidence FINITE 0..1; missing subject → {ok:false}; useConceptNet:false keeps it network-free + deterministic. ConceptNet failure degrades to local-only. Already behaviorally pinned by server/tests/commonsense-domain-parity.test.js; authored spec documents the component contract for the lens gate.
